content.goal: Analyze and optimize the workflow-agent support project.
constraints: Keep changes scoped to workflow-agent files
Do not modify unrelated dirty worktree changes
assumptions: 优化 means practical maintainability/reliability improvements, not a redesign
No external Codemap/Understand tool is currently exposed, so project understanding uses focused source inspection
acceptance_criteria: Identify concrete risks in current workflow-agent scripts/docs
Apply minimal optimizations that improve reliability or portability
